description_for_model: 22 pay-per-call utility APIs for AI agents using the x402 protocol. Services: ScrapePay (web scraping via Playwright), MarkdownOpt (URL/HTML to clean markdown), StructExtract (HTML to structured JSON), CacheServe (URL fetch with caching), LinkRisk (URL risk profile), LinkSafe (URL safety via Playwright+VirusTotal), PromptGuard (prompt injection scoring), SchemaGate (JSON Schema validation), DocConvert-Text (format conversion), DocConvert-PDF (HTML/markdown to PDF), NotifyRelay email/telegram/webhook (notifications), PDF Render (high-fidelity URL to PDF), EmbedPay (text to 1536-dim embeddings via OpenAI text-embedding-3-small), MEMSCRUB (indirect prompt injection scanner for RAG content), MemoryServe (semantic agent memory via Qdrant + SQLite), ImageGuard (NSFW image classification — adult/explicit content scoring), IntentFlow (context handoff relay for multi-agent delegation), xAudit (API response quality validation with cryptographic certificates), KYA Oracle (on-chain trust scoring for Ethereum/Base wallets), Loopwall (agent loop firewall and budget provenance for multi-agent chains). Capabilities: web extraction, content moderation, response validation, multi-agent context relay, wallet trust scoring, loop prevention, semantic memory, embeddings, notifications, document conversion. All charged in USDC on Base via x402 protocol. No account required. Charge-on-failure-safe across the fleet.
description_for_human: 22 pay-per-call x402 utility APIs for AI agents. Scrape, embed, store, validate, notify, convert, score wallets, prevent loops, relay intents. No accounts, no API keys. Pay in USDC on Base.
